quote: Even if only one person in the world cared about me, I could keep living for that person.
As long as you are by my side, I do not care about what others think.
I will keep moving forward to achieve my goal, no matter how hard it gets.
The important thing isn't where we are, it's that the five of us are together.
Happiness as a mother, and happiness as an idol... I want both!
Aura, the one standing in front of you, is a mage who has lived for a thousand years.
In this world, winning is everything. As long as I win in the end… That's all that matters.
Being alone is not synonymous with being lonely.
You shouldn't say you don't like things you love just because you're embarrassed.

anime: The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity
quote: If you're willing to go out with me, I couldn't be happier!
If all you do is adapt to others, you will lose your true self.

anime: Rascal Does Not Dream of Bunny Girl Senpai
quote: I might be more lonely than you think, so don't leave my side.
I don't care about your past. I only care about the person you are right now.
I'll become your star. I'll make sure you only look at me.
Even if the whole world hates you, I'll be the one to understand you.
I will use everything and everyone available to achieve my goal.
If you don't belong here, then just build a place where you do.
I don't care what happens to me, as long as you survive.
I'm not built different. I just have a promise I need to keep.
I'll take you to the top myself, so don't you dare give up now!
